title: Sterling DCC100 Chrome Plated Door Chain
features: Ideal for use on both wooden and uPVC Doors
description: The Sterling standard sized Chrome Plated Door chain is ideal for use on both wooden and uPVC Doors. Provides additional security for the homeowner, enabling them to place the Chain on both the door and frame restricting access to any visitors and providing both security & confidence to the householders. Manufactured to exacting standards - with a 10-Year product guarantee. Sterling products are equal to the best in the market and are backed with guarantees of up to 10 years. Sterling is a brand of Burg-Wächter one of the largest manufactures of security products in the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions.
